2026-04-23T03:44:05.0246452Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-23T03:44:05.0246997Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-23T03:44:05.0247430Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-23T03:44:05.0247964Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-23T03:44:05.0248272Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-23T03:44:05.0248505Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-23T03:44:05.0248662Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-23T03:44:05.0248837Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-23T03:44:05.0249006Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-23T03:44:05.0249235Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-23T03:44:05.0249435Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-23T03:44:05.0249718Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-23T03:44:05.0249977Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

The package exposes a rich API surface covering Azure cost-management operations: consumption budgets, usage details, marketplace purchases, charges, reservation summaries/details, and reservation recommendations. Despite this breadth, the README contains **no inline code examples** and the `tests/Samples/` directory does not exist.\n\n## Gaps Found\n\n- No service-specific code examples showing how to authenticate and call the main APIs (e.g., list usage details, manage budgets, retrieve charges)\n- `tests/Samples/` directory is missing — no test-backed snippets to power the `Update-Snippets.ps1` workflow\n- **Key concepts** section is a single generic link; it does not describe the Consumption resource model, scope-based access (`ArmClient` + `ResourceIdentifier` scope), or the main resource types (`ConsumptionBudgetResource`, `ConsumptionUsageDetail`, etc.)\n- Examples section only references generic \"all Azure SDK samples\" links; no Consumption-specific walkthroughs\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/summary\u003e\n\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\n\n### Step 1: Modify files\n\n**Edit** `sdk/consumption/Azure.ResourceManager.Consumption/README.md`\n\nReplace the `## Key concepts` section with content that describes:\n\n- **Scope-based access**: All Consumption APIs accept a `ResourceIdentifier scope` (subscription, management group, billing account, etc.)\n- **ConsumptionBudgetResource**: Represents a cost budget with alert thresholds\n- **ConsumptionUsageDetail**: Represents individual usage line items\n- **ConsumptionChargeSummary / ConsumptionMarketplace**: Charge and marketplace purchase summaries\n- **Reservation APIs**: Summaries, details, and recommendations for reserved capacity\n\nReplace the `## Examples` section to reference snippet placeholders (see Step 2).\n\n---\n\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\n\n**Create** `sdk/consumption/Azure.ResourceManager.Consumption/tests/Samples/Sample1_Budgets.cs`\n\n```csharp\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\n\nusing Azure.Identity;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Consumption;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Consumption.Models;\nusing NUnit.Framework;\nusing System;\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\n\nnamespace Azure.ResourceManager.Consumption.Tests.Samples\n{\n    public class Sample1_Budgets\n    {\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only verifying that the sample builds\")]\n        public async Task CreateAndGetBudget()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:CreateConsumptionBudget\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\n            string subscriptionId = \"\u003cyour-subscription-id\u003e\";\n            ResourceIdentifier scope = new ResourceIdentifier($\"/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}\");\n\n            ConsumptionBudgetCollection budgets = client.GetConsumptionBudgets(scope);\n\n            // Create a monthly budget with a $100 limit\n            string budgetName = \"myMonthlyBudget\";\n            ConsumptionBudgetData budgetData = new ConsumptionBudgetData\n            {\n                Category = BudgetCategory.Cost,\n                Amount = 100,\n                TimeGrain = BudgetTimeGrainType.Monthly,\n                TimePeriod = new BudgetTimePeriod(\n                    startDate: DateTimeOffset.UtcNow,\n                    endDate: DateTimeOffset.UtcNow.AddYears(1))\n            };\n            ArmOperation\u003cConsumptionBudgetResource\u003e createOp = await budgets.CreateOrUpdateAsync(\n                WaitUntil.Completed, budgetName, budgetData);\n            ConsumptionBudgetResource budget = createOp.Value;\n            Console.WriteLine($\"Budget '{budget.Data.Name}' created with limit {budget.Data.Amount}\");\n            #endregion\n        }\n\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only verifying that the sample builds\")]\n        public async Task ListBudgets()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:ListConsumptionBudgets\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\n            string subscriptionId = \"\u003cyour-subscription-id\u003e\";\n            ResourceIdentifier scope = new ResourceIdentifier($\"/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}\");\n\n            await foreach (ConsumptionBudgetResource budget in client.GetConsumptionBudgets(scope))\n            {\n                Console.WriteLine($\"Budget: {budget.Data.Name}, Limit: {budget.Data.Amount}\");\n            }\n            #endregion\n        }\n    }\n}\n```\n\n**Create** `sdk/consumption/Azure.ResourceManager.Consumption/tests/Samples/Sample2_UsageDetails.cs`\n\n```csharp\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\n\nusing Azure.Identity;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Consumption;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Consumption.Models;\nusing NUnit.Framework;\nusing System;\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\n\nnamespace Azure.ResourceManager.Consumption.Tests.Samples\n{\n    public class Sample2_UsageDetails\n    {\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only verifying that the sample builds\")]\n        public async Task ListUsageDetails()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:ListConsumptionUsageDetails\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\n            string subscriptionId = \"\u003cyour-subscription-id\u003e\";\n            ResourceIdentifier scope = new ResourceIdentifier($\"/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}\");\n\n            await foreach (ConsumptionUsageDetail usageDetail in client.GetConsumptionUsageDetailsAsync(scope))\n            {\n                Console.WriteLine($\"Resource: {usageDetail.Id}, Cost: {usageDetail.PretaxCost}\");\n            }\n            #endregion\n        }\n    }\n}\n```\n\n**Add snippet placeholders** to `sdk/consumption/Azure.ResourceManager.Consumption/README.md` in the `## Examples` section:\n\n```markdown\n## Examples\n\n### Create a budget\n\n```C# Snippet:CreateConsumptionBudget\n```\n\n### List budgets\n\n```C# Snippet:ListConsumptionBudgets\n```\n\n### List usage details\n\n```C# Snippet:ListConsumptionUsageDetails\n```\n```\n\n---\n\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\n\nThe README currently contains all required top-level sections. 2026-04-23T03:47:20.8270869Z server:unified callBackendTool: serverID=safeoutputs, toolName=create_issue, args=map[body:## Documentation Gap
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8270874Z 
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8271004Z **Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.Consumption`
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8271215Z **Service directory:** `sdk/consumption/Azure.ResourceManager.Consumption/`
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8271362Z **Triggered by:** commit 5e2e0280c (PR #58536) by @azure-sdk
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8271366Z 
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8271449Z ## What Changed
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8271453Z 
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8273320Z The `Azure.ResourceManager.Consumption` package (v1.1.0 → v1.2.0-beta.1) was added to the repository. The package exposes a rich API surface covering Azure cost-management operations: consumption budgets, usage details, marketplace purchases, charges, reservation summaries/details, and reservation recommendations. Despite this breadth, the README contains **no inline code examples** and the `tests/Samples/` directory does not exist.
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8273327Z 
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8273398Z ## Gaps Found
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8273402Z 
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8273843Z - No service-specific code examples showing how to authenticate and call the main APIs (e.g., list usage details, manage budgets, retrieve charges)
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8274239Z - `tests/Samples/` directory is missing — no test-backed snippets to power the `Update-Snippets.ps1` workflow
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8275184Z - **Key concepts** section is a single generic link; it does not describe the Consumption resource model, scope-based access (`ArmClient` + `ResourceIdentifier` scope), or the main resource types (`ConsumptionBudgetResource`, `ConsumptionUsageDetail`, etc.)
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8275507Z - Examples section only references generic "all Azure SDK samples" links; no Consumption-specific walkthroughs
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8275515Z 
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8275583Z <details>
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8275790Z <summary><strong>📐 Implementation Guide</strong></summary>
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8275799Z 
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8276116Z This section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8276120Z 
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8276198Z ### Step 1: Modify files
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8276208Z 
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8276408Z **Edit** `sdk/consumption/Azure.ResourceManager.Consumption/README.md`
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8276412Z 
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8276573Z Replace the `## Key concepts` section with content that describes:
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8276589Z 
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8277004Z - **Scope-based access**: All Consumption APIs accept a `ResourceIdentifier scope` (subscription, management group, billing account, etc.)
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8277227Z - **ConsumptionBudgetResource**: Represents a cost budget with alert thresholds
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8277403Z - **ConsumptionUsageDetail**: Represents individual usage line items
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8277691Z - **ConsumptionChargeSummary / ConsumptionMarketplace**: Charge and marketplace purchase summaries
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8277915Z - **Reservation APIs**: Summaries, details, and recommendations for reserved capacity
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8277920Z 
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8278131Z Replace the `## Examples` section to reference snippet placeholders (see Step 2).
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8278140Z 
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8278323Z ---
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8278328Z 
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8278421Z ### Step 2: Add or update code snippets
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8278425Z 
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8278718Z **Create** `sdk/consumption/Azure.ResourceManager.Consumption/tests/Samples/Sample1_Budgets.cs`
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8278722Z 
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8278790Z ```csharp
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8278948Z // Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8279038Z // Licensed under the MIT License.
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8279043Z 
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8279126Z using Azure.Identity;
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8279216Z using Azure.ResourceManager;
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8279329Z using Azure.ResourceManager.Consumption;
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8279456Z using Azure.ResourceManager.Consumption.Models;
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8279538Z using NUnit.Framework;
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8279607Z using System;
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8279701Z using System.Threading.Tasks;
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8279705Z 
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8279871Z namespace Azure.ResourceManager.Consumption.Tests.Samples
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8279952Z {
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8280039Z     public class Sample1_Budgets
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8280103Z     {
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8280182Z         [Test]
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8280301Z         [Ignore("Only verifying that the sample builds")]
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8280410Z         public async Task CreateAndGetBudget()
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8280476Z         {
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8280590Z             #region Snippet:CreateConsumptionBudget
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8280767Z             ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8280906Z             string subscriptionId = "<your-subscription-id>";
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8281161Z             ResourceIdentifier scope = new ResourceIdentifier($"/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}");
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8281165Z 
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8281398Z             ConsumptionBudgetCollection budgets = client.GetConsumptionBudgets(scope);
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8281403Z 
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8281642Z             // Create a monthly budget with a $100 limit
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8281754Z             string budgetName = "myMonthlyBudget";
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8282049Z             ConsumptionBudgetData budgetData = new ConsumptionBudgetData
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8282117Z             {
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8282221Z                 Category = BudgetCategory.Cost,
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8282297Z                 Amount = 100,
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8282418Z                 TimeGrain = BudgetTimeGrainType.Monthly,
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8282519Z                 TimePeriod = new BudgetTimePeriod(
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8282627Z                     startDate: DateTimeOffset.UtcNow,
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8282756Z                     endDate: DateTimeOffset.UtcNow.AddYears(1))
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8282826Z             };
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8283098Z             ArmOperation<ConsumptionBudgetResource> createOp = await budgets.CreateOrUpdateAsync(
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8283231Z                 WaitUntil.Completed, budgetName, budgetData);
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8283377Z             ConsumptionBudgetResource budget = createOp.Value;
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8283651Z             Console.WriteLine($"Budget '{budget.Data.Name}' created with limit {budget.Data.Amount}");
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8283723Z             #endregion
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8283789Z         }
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8283798Z 
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8283864Z         [Test]
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8283985Z         [Ignore("Only verifying that the sample builds")]
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8284086Z         public async Task ListBudgets()
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8284150Z         {
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8284259Z             #region Snippet:ListConsumptionBudgets
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8284431Z             ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8284563Z             string subscriptionId = "<your-subscription-id>";
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8284814Z             ResourceIdentifier scope = new ResourceIdentifier($"/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}");
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8284818Z 
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8285208Z             await foreach (ConsumptionBudgetResource budget in client.GetConsumptionBudgets(scope))
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8285274Z             {
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8285510Z                 Console.WriteLine($"Budget: {budget.Data.Name}, Limit: {budget.Data.Amount}");
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8285575Z             }
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8285650Z             #endregion
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8285714Z         }
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8285777Z     }
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8285844Z }
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8285907Z ```
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8285911Z 
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8286212Z **Create** `sdk/consumption/Azure.ResourceManager.Consumption/tests/Samples/Sample2_UsageDetails.cs`

2026-04-23T03:47:20.8286529Z 
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8286611Z using Azure.Identity;
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8286697Z using Azure.ResourceManager;
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8286784Z using Azure.ResourceMa
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8286846Z ...

2026-04-23T03:47:20.8287450Z ##[group]tools.json (4727 bytes)
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8287520Z {
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8287591Z   "servers": {
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8287666Z     "github": [
2026-04-23T03:47:20.8287730Z       {

2026-04-23T03:47:20.8287988Z         "description": "Get details for a commit from a GitHub repository"
